body.content:
Dear Support Team,

I am writing to inquire about the status of Invoice #INV-2026-0042 related to Purchase Order PO#12345.

We submitted this invoice on March 15, 2026, for an amount of $45,000 USD for the Q1 IT consulting services. As of today, we have not received any confirmation of receipt or expected payment timeline.

Could you please:
1. Confirm receipt of the invoice
2. Provide the expected payment date
3. Let us know if any additional documentation is required

Our payment terms are Net 30, so we would appreciate a timely response.

Best regards,
Rajesh Kumar
Accounts Receivable
Vendor Corp International
Phone: +91-9876543210
Email: rajesh.kumar@vendorcorp.com
